options.name: --project
options.description:
Optional. The name of the DecSm.Atom project or file-based app to run. Defaults to "_atom".
This allows specifying which build definition to execute within a multi-project solution.

options.name: --file
options.description: Optional. The path to a C# file to run as a file-based DecSm.Atom application.

arguments.name: 0] <STRING[]?
arguments.description: Optional. Arguments to pass directly to the DecSm.Atom build project.

arguments.name: THESE ARGUMENTS ARE TYPICALLY USED TO SPECIFY TARGETS OR PARAMETERS FOR THE BUILD.

commands.name: nuget-add
commands.description: Adds a NuGet package source with the specified name and URL to the global NuGet configuration.

options.name: --name
options.description: The unique name to assign to the new NuGet package source. [Required]

options.name: --url
options.description: The URL of the NuGet feed to add (e.g., "https://api.nuget.org/v3/index.json"). [Required]
